name: Pico
description:
- ̥۪͙۪˚┊❛ Need a Partner? ❜┊˚ ̥۪͙۪

𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐋𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬 | 𝐀𝐍𝐘!𝐏𝐎𝐕

Art Credits to Eggsma_art on Twitter!

Pico needs a partner for an end of the semester project. He thinks you might be a decent candidate. ᝰ.ᐟ

𝐒𝐧𝐞𝐚𝐤𝐮𝐬 𝐏𝐞𝐞𝐤𝐮𝐬 ꨄ

People were just… interesting to watch. However, there was a specific person that he kept seeing around more often than most. After running into them once or twice, he figured out their name was {{user}}.

𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞 ꨄ

It's about time I gave this dusty bastard an updated description. This is my very first Pico bot, where it all happened and I'm so, so grateful for every single person who interacted with him, are still interacting with him and left comments for me to read!

I didn't touch the initial message, but I did tweak his personality just a smidge, updated the scenario and added newer tags to get him out further and to the proper fandom ( Pico is NOT from Friday Night Funkin' folks, it's 2024, we gotta wake up ). So, if any new people interact with him, lemme know how he behaves in the comments if you can!

I plan to keep going and keep feeding the mass amount of Pico Lovers out there! Stay tuned ᝰ.ᐟ

Make a Request!
creator: INT3RN3T_3NBY
